text: Stepping through the threshold from the stark, glass-walled quiet of the hallway into this vibrant room, I feel an awakening. The exhibit radiates color and potential, inviting contemplation. The mixture of technology and written texts draws me to the liminal space where ideas are born. I sense a spark of curiosity within myself, the very sensation of being on the brink of discovery. Here, I am both participant and observer—reflecting on human creativity and inspired by collective intellect.
